description: This JSON file represents the complete data structure for a blog post/article as returned from the GET post API endpoint. Use this as a reference for generating article content.

postStructure.title: string (required, min 3 characters)
postStructure.slug: string (unique, auto-generated from title if not provided)
postStructure.image: string (optional, image URL for backward compatibility)
postStructure.heroImage: string (optional, main hero image URL - Cloudinary URL preferred)
postStructure.status: PostStatus enum (required): DRAFT | PUBLISHED | SCHEDULED | ARCHIVED
postStructure.type: PageType enum (required): BLOG_POST | DEAL | DESTINATION | ITINERARY | GUIDE
postStructure.authorId: string (MongoDB ObjectId, required for creating posts)
tagIds: string (array of tag IDs, used when creating/updating posts)
postStructure.featured: boolean (optional, default false, show on homepage)
postStructure.pillarPage: boolean (optional, default false, is this pillar content)
postStructure.readTime: number (optional, estimated read time in minutes)
postStructure.metaTitle: string (optional, custom SEO title, defaults to title if null)
postStructure.metaDescription: string (optional, custom meta description for SEO)

examplePost.title: 10 Best Travel Destinations in 2024
examplePost.description: Explore the top 10 must-visit destinations for 2024
examplePost.excerpt: From tropical paradises to cultural hubs, here are the destinations you can't miss this year.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit these destinations?
faqs.answer: The best time varies by destination, but generally spring and fall offer the best weather and fewer crowds.

faqs.question: Do I need a visa for these countries?
faqs.answer: Visa requirements depend on your nationality. Check with each country's embassy for specific requirements.

examplePost.metaTitle: Top 10 Travel Destinations 2024 | Best Places to Visit
examplePost.metaDescription: Discover the 10 best travel destinations for 2024. From tropical beaches to cultural cities, plan your next adventure.

notes.contentFormat: Content should be in HTML or Markdown format. The system uses TipTap editor which supports rich text formatting.
notes.slugGeneration: If slug is not provided, it will be auto-generated from the title. Slugs must be unique.
notes.statusDefault: If status is not provided, it defaults to DRAFT.
notes.typeDefault: If type is not provided, it defaults to BLOG_POST.
notes.imageFields: Use heroImage for the main hero image. The image field is kept for backward compatibility.
notes.dates: All date fields should be in ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z').
notes.ids: All IDs are MongoDB ObjectIds (24 character hex strings).
notes.faqsAndItemLists: FAQs and itemListItems are optional arrays. The order field is used for sorting.
notes.seoFields: metaTitle and metaDescription are important for SEO. If metaTitle is not provided, the title will be used.
